pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states: "Save the workbook as \"Profit_Status_Analysis\" (it will save as a .dva file...)"
Task description states saving to Documents folder. Environment scripts confirm Docker is the user profile.
Task description explicitly states: "Create a new Calculation named \"Profit Status\"."
Task description explicitly states: "If \"Profit\" is greater than or equal to 0, it is \"Profitable\"."
Task description explicitly states: "Otherwise, it is \"Loss\"."
Task description explicitly states: "Set the visualization title to \"Regional Profitability Mix\"."

privileged_info_summary: The correct output file is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Profit_Status_Analysis.dva. The visualization requires a calculation named "Profit Status" mapping profit >= 0 to "Profitable" and otherwise to "Loss". The chart title must be "Regional Profitability Mix". These values are confirmed by the task description and environment details.
